name: project
description: Manage project — create a new project, create a new checkout key, create an environment variable. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: org-slug-or-id
parameters.description: Org UUID or slug in the form `vcs-slug/org-name`. For projects that use GitLab or GitHub App, use `circleci` as the `vcs-slug` and replace the `org-name` with the organization ID (found in Organization Settings).
